title: selaginella philippina
intro: Selaginella philippina, also known as the Philippine spikemoss, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Selaginella philippina include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of various diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tea, infusion, or powder, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
